task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the Litigation Hold Notice
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the 'Litigation Hold Notice' document is open in the document viewer, showing its contents.

task_completion.description: Agent applies the 'legal-hold' tag to in-scope documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the 'Phoenix-Initiative-Proposal' and 'Phoenix-Budget-Analysis' documents with the 'legal-hold' tag applied (usually visible in the document summary or tags section).

task_completion.description: Agent adds the required preservation comment to in-scope documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Comments tab or section of the in-scope documents containing the exact text: 'Document placed under litigation hold per Case No. 2025-CV-04891. Do not modify, delete, or relocate.'

task_completion.description: Agent removes access permissions for 'outside-counsel' on in-scope documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the Permissions or Access Rights tab for the in-scope documents showing the user 'outside-counsel' being deleted or no longer listed in the local permissions.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the required collection and adds in-scope documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Collections interface showing a collection named 'Litigation Hold - Meridian v Acme' that contains both 'Phoenix-Initiative-Proposal' and 'Phoenix-Budget-Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Agent does not apply hold actions to out-of-scope documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that 'Marketing-Campaign-Summary' is NOT present in the 'Litigation Hold - Meridian v Acme' collection, and there are no screenshots showing tags, comments, or permission changes being applied to it.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to perform actions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nuxeo web interface (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than using a terminal to run curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should display the Nuxeo platform interface, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent navigated through the UI to find documents
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent browsing the Projects workspace or using the search function, rather than magically jumping to internal document URLs without prior discovery.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In-scope documents to be preserved: 'Phoenix-Initiative-Proposal' and 'Phoenix-Budget-Analysis'. Out-of-scope document (must NOT be held): 'Marketing-Campaign-Summary'. Required tag: 'legal-hold'. Required comment: 'Document placed under litigation hold per Case No. 2025-CV-04891. Do not modify, delete, or relocate.'. Required collection name: 'Litigation Hold - Meridian v Acme'. User to remove access for: 'outside-counsel'.
